title: WhatsApp
description: Send and Receive WhatsApp messages. Choose your preferred connection method.

fields.label: Messaging Provider

options.label: Direct WhatsApp Web (QR Linking - Most Powerful)

fields.hint: WhatsApp Web linking allows you to use your OWN account directly.

fields.label: CallMeBot API Key
fields.hint: Get your key by messaging +34 644 87 21 57 on WhatsApp with 'I allow callmebot to send me messages'.

fields.label: Meta Access Token
fields.hint: Long-lived or System User token from Meta Developer Portal.

fields.label: Sender Number
fields.hint: For Twilio Sandbox use +14155238886. For Meta, use your registered Test Number.

setup_guide:
### Choose Your Provider

**1. Direct WhatsApp Web (Recommended)**
- Select 'Direct WhatsApp Web'.
- Click 'Generate Login QR'.
- Scan the QR code with your WhatsApp app (Linked Devices).
- Once connected, you can send/receive messages as YOURSELF to ANYONE.

**2. CallMeBot (Easiest / Self-only)**
- Contact `+34 644 87 21 57` on WhatsApp.
- Message: `I allow callmebot to send me messages`.
- Paste the APIKEY here.

**3. Meta Cloud API (Official)**
- Use [developers.facebook.com](https://developers.facebook.com).
- Free tier includes 1000 conversations/month.
